name: economic-stress-and-psychological-well-being-in-latin-america-2000-2025
title: Longitudinal dataset (2000-2025) examining the relationship between economic stress indicators and mental health outcomes across 19 Latin American countries. Variables: GDP per capita, unemployment rate, inflation, Gini coefficient, poverty rate, eco
